name: LIBRETRO
description: Configurações para o emulador LIBRETRO geradas a partir do es_features.cfg.

options.label: LCD GHOSTING FILTER
options.description: Simulate CRT phosphor ghosting effects. 'Simple' performs a 50:50 mix of the current and previous frames.

options.label: Resolução Interna
options.description: Improve the resolution at the cost of increased performance requirements.

options.label: Vídeo FORMAT
options.description: Select a Vídeo format for output.

options.label: Resolução Interna
options.description: Improve the resolution at the cost of increased performance requirements.

options.label: SCREEN LAYOUT POSITIONING
options.description: Choose the disposition of the emulated screens.

options.label: SWAP SCREEN
options.description: Set the bottom screen as prominent.

options.label: DISABLE HARDWARE SHADERS
options.description: Disable hardware renderer, can increase compatibility.

options.label: Filtragem de Texturas
options.description: Force the region of the system.

options.label: CUSTOM TEXTURES
options.description: Replace original textures with custom textures pack.

options.label: Vídeo CORE RENDERER
options.description: Change the renderer used by the core.

options.label: Não SPRITE LIMIT
options.description: Remove the 4 sprites per line limit which can reduce or remove sprite flicker in some games.

options.label: Não SPRITE LIMIT
options.description: Remove the original sprites-per-scanline hardware limit.

options.label: BLUR Emulação
options.description: Blurs adjacent pixels to simulate SDTV resolution, can be required by some games to emulate transparency.

options.label: CROP OVERSCAN
options.description: Crop out the potentially random glitchy Vídeo output that would have been hidden by the bezel around the edge of a standard-definition television screen.

options.label: MONITOR TYPE
options.description: Define the type of monitor, will change colors.

options.label: Resolução Interna
options.description: Improve the resolution at the cost of increased performance requirements.

options.description: Choose the disposition of the emulated screens.

options.description: Set the bottom screen as prominent.

options.description: Force the region of the system.

options.label: CUSTOM TEXTURES
options.description: Replace original textures with custom textures pack.

options.label: SCREEN LAYOUT POSITIONING
options.description: Choose the disposition of the emulated screens.

options.label: HYBRID RATIO
options.description: Size of the largest screen when using a hybrid screen layout.

options.label: HYBRID SMALL SCREEN MODE
options.description: Select which screen will be shown when using hybrid layout.

options.label: SCREEN GAP
options.description: Configure gap between both screens in pixels.

options.label: TEXTURE UPSCALING
options.description: Choose xBRZ texture enhancement level.

options.label: Anti-Aliasing (FXAA)
options.description: OpenGL only.

options.label: COLOR DEPTH
options.description: OpenGL only.

options.label: SMOOTH TEXTURES
options.description: OpenGL only.

options.label: USE OPENGL (CORE)
options.description: Enable OpenGL renderer, RetroArch driver must be set to OpenGL.

options.label: COMPILE SHADERS BEFORE STARTING
options.description: May reduce stuttering a the cost of longer delay to start a game.

options.label: ENABLE GPU-TEXTURE-DECODING
options.description: Can increase performance when using powerful GPU.

options.label: VERTEX ROUNDING
options.description: Can fix some games when using a non-native resolution by rounding 2D edges.

options.label: Anti-Aliasing (FXAA)
options.description: Set Anti Aliasing level for rendered content.

options.label: Filtragem Anisotrópica
options.description: Enhance the quality of textures Ativado surface.

options.label: FORCE TEXTURES FILTERING
options.description: Filter all textures. Including any that the game explicitly sets as unfiltered. Disabled by Padrão.

options.label: MANUAL TEXTURE SAMPLING
options.description: Allow for correct Emulação of texture wrapping, but comes at a cost of performance.

options.label: CROP OVERSCAN
options.description: Crop the picture from its native aspect ratio to 4:3 or 16:9

options.label: CUSTOM TEXTURES
options.description: Replace original textures with custom textures pack.

options.label: EMULATED GRAPHIC CHIP
options.description: The type of emulated graphic chip.

options.label: SVGA MODE
options.description: The SVGA variation that is being emulated.

values.label: S3 TRIO64 Não LINES BUFFER HACK

options.label: CGA MODE
options.description: The CGA variation that is being emulated.

options.label: HERCULES COLOR MODE
options.description: The color scheme for Hercules Emulação.

options.label: 3DFX VOODOO ACCELERATOR
options.description: Enable certain games with support for the 3Dfx Voodoo accelerator.

options.label: 3DFX VOODOO PERFORMANCE
options.description: Tweak the behavior of the 3Dfx Voodoo Emulação.

options.label: 3DFX VOODOO SCALING
options.description: Increase the 3DFx Voodoo OpenGL resolution.

options.label: SCREEN LAYOUT POSITIONING
options.description: Choose the disposition of the emulated screens for multiplayer games.

options.label: Proporção de Tela (CORE)
options.description: Choose the core-provided aspect ratio. RetroArch's aspect ratio must be set to Core provided in the Vídeo settings.

options.label: Proporção de Tela (CORE)
options.description: Choose the core-provided aspect ratio. RetroArch's aspect ratio must be set to Core provided in the Vídeo settings.

options.label: REFRESH RATE (FPS)
options.description: Configure the fps.

options.label: PALETTE
options.description: Choose the color palette.

options.label: FPS
options.description: Use 50 for European console and 60 for japanese console.

options.label: DISPLAY TYPE
options.description: Select the type of display framing. Use EMUSCV value to correct original console display bugs.

options.label: PIXEL RATIO
options.description: Define whether to use rectangular or square pixel ratio.

options.label: PALETTE
options.description: Define the color palette, Old NTSC reproduces the old ugly japanese TV colors.

options.label: ENABLE RESOLUTION CHANGE
options.description: Enable intelligent zoom function.

options.label: TATE MODE
options.description: Rotate display for vertical games, to enable for use with mega-bezels.

options.label: TATE MODE
options.description: Rotate display for vertical games, to enable for use with mega-bezels.

options.label: Automático ROTATE
options.description: Automaticaly rotate display for vertical games.

options.label: Automático ROTATE
options.description: Automaticaly rotate display for vertical games.

options.label: TATE MODE
options.description: Rotate display for vertical games, to enable for use with mega-bezels.

options.label: EMULATED CABLE TYPE
options.description: Apply a Vídeo filter to mimic various signals.

options.label: POWERVR2 POST-PROCESSING FILTER
options.description: Simulate effects specific to the PowerVR2 GPU and analog Vídeo signals.

options.label: TATE MODE
options.description: Rotate display for vertical games, to enable for use with mega-bezels.

options.label: RENDER TO MULTIPLE THREADS
options.description: Leave this Ativado by Padrão, will use multiple threads for rendering.

options.label: TEXTURE UPSCALING
options.description: Enhance hand drawn 2D pixel art graphics.

options.label: Filtragem Anisotrópica
options.description: Enhance the quality of textures Ativado surface.

options.label: Filtragem de Texturas
options.description: Control the texture filtering of the Emulação.

options.label: RENDER-TO-TEXTURE BUFFER
options.description: Enhance graphics accuracy at the cost of inscreased performance requirements.

options.label: DISABLE FOG
options.description: Disable fog effects.

options.label: ALPHA SORTING
options.description: Enhance graphics accuracy at the cost of inscreased performance requirements.

options.label: CUSTOM TEXTURES
options.description: Replace original textures with custom textures pack in 'bios\dc\textures'.

options.label: Proporção de Tela (CORE)
options.description: Choose the core-provided aspect ratio. RetroArch's aspect ratio must be set to Core provided in the Vídeo settings.

options.label: OVERSCAN
options.description: Display the overscan regions of the screen.

options.label: INTERLACED OUTPUT MODE
options.description: Single Field applies a de-interlacing filter, Duplo Field mimics the original hardware.

options.label: EMULATED Vídeo SIGNAL
options.description: Apply a Vídeo filter to mimic various signals.

options.label: WIDESCREEN - EXTRA COLUMNS TO DRAW
options.description: Set the amount of extra columns to draw for widescreen.

options.label: Proporção de Tela (CORE)
options.description: Choose the core-provided aspect ratio. RetroArch's aspect ratio must be set to Core provided in the Vídeo settings.

options.label: RENDERER
options.description: Specify the Vídeo rendering method. Accurate is the more precise but is slower, good and fast are faster but can fail for some games.

options.label: Não SPRITE LIMIT
options.description: Remove the original sprites-per-scanline hardware limit.

options.label: DYNAMIC RECOMPILERS
options.description: Enable dynamic recompilers which help to improve performance.

options.label: DISABLE ARTWORK
options.description: Disable the check of artworks in 'saves\mame\artwork' folder.

options.label: HISCORES
options.description: Saves the hiscores in supported games.

options.label: TATE MODE
options.description: Rotate display for vertical screen.

options.label: TATE MODE
options.description: Rotate display for vertical screen.

options.label: LCD GHOSTING EFFECT
options.description: Simulates ghosting, can help to reduce flickering.

options.label: COLOR PALETTE
options.description: Choose which color palette is going to be used.

options.label: Não SPRITE LIMIT
options.description: Remove the original sprites-per-scanline hardware limit.

options.label: OVERSCAN
options.description: Show or crop overscan. 'Automático' will try to adapt to game, cropping empty areas.

options.label: EMULATED SIGNAL TYPE
options.description: Apply a Vídeo filter to mimic various signals.

options.label: Não SPRITE LIMIT
options.description: Remove the original sprites-per-scanline hardware limit.

options.label: Resolução Interna
options.description: Modify rendering resolution.

options.label: PIXEL BLENDING
options.description: Blend pixel together when in hires mode. Higher values will blur the picture more.

options.label: Não SPRITE LIMIT
options.description: Remove the original sprites-per-scanline hardware limit.

options.label: FORCE NTSC TIMINGS
options.description: This option can be used to override PAL timings to run games with NTSC timings.

options.label: Proporção de Tela (CORE)
options.description: The aspect ratio that's used by the core.

options.label: CROP MODE
options.description: Crop out the potentially Vídeo output that would have been hidden by the bezel.

options.label: Anti-Aliasing (FXAA)
options.description: Set Anti Aliasing level for rendered content.

options.label: Filtragem de Texturas
options.description: Nearest emulates original hardware. Others filters may improve texture or reduce pixelation.

options.label: SCALED DITHERING
options.description: Scales the dithern pattern to the resolution scale of the emulated GPU.

options.label: TRUE COLOR
options.description: Disable dithering and use the full 8 bits per channel color information.

options.label: Vídeo CORE RENDERER
options.description: Change the renderer used by the core.

options.description: This option can be used to override PAL timings to run games with NTSC timings.

options.description: Nearest emulates original hardware. Others filters may improve texture or reduce pixelation.

options.label: CUSTOM TEXTURES
options.description: Replace original textures with custom textures pack.

options.label: DITHERING PATTERN
options.description: Enabling this will downsampling to native color depth. Disabling enable output at higher color depth.

options.description: Select the Vídeo renderer, gun games will only work with 'Software'.

options.label: DISABLE DITHERING
options.description: If Desativado, disables the dithering pattern the PSX applies to combat color banding.

options.description: Only compatible with OpenGL driver.

options.label: Proporção de Tela (CORE)
options.description: Set 'core-provided' in RetroArch options for this setting to take effect.

options.label: Não SPRITE LIMIT
options.description: Remove the original sprites-per-scanline hardware limit.

options.label: PALETTE
options.description: If Custom is selected it will use MesenPalette.pal as custom palette in bios directory.

options.description: Replaces game's sprites by HD pack available in HdPacks bios directory.

options.label: CROP SIZE SIDES
options.description: Define the number of pixels to crop.

options.label: CROP SIZE TOP/BOTTOM
options.description: Define the number of pixels to crop.

options.label: WIDESCREEN
options.description: Display the emulated framebuffer at a widescreen aspect ratio. Get best results with full 3D games.

options.label: CROP OVERSCAN
options.description: Zooms in to hide black borders. Borders are different per game.

options.label: ANTI ALIASING (MSAA)
options.description: Multi-Sampling Anti Aliasing level.

options.label: TEXTURE ENHANCEMENT
options.description: Choose between various texture enhancement filters.

options.label: Filtragem de Texturas
options.description: Select texture filtering mode.

options.label: Filtragem Bilinear MODE
options.description: Select a Filtragem Bilinear method.

options.label: ENABLE NATIVE RES TEXTURE COORDINATES
options.description: Prevents some artifacts but can result in hard edges.

options.label: ENABLE NATIVE RES 2D TEXTRECTS
options.description: Can fix misaligned 2D images like mario kart character selection.

options.label: CUSTOM TEXTURES
options.description: Replace original textures with custom textures pack.

options.label: ENABLE PARALLEL
options.description: Não: 'GLideN64' for best HLE performance. Sim: 'ParaLLEl' for LLE (accuracy).

options.label: TEXTURE UPSCALING
options.description: Apply internal upscaling factor.

options.label: DOWNSAMPLING (SSAA)
options.description: Smooth polygons by downscaling the image to either half its size, one quarter of its size, or one eight of its size.

options.label: Anti-Aliasing (FXAA)
options.description: Anti-aliased fetch filter, smooth polygons edges.

options.label: BILINEAR SCALING
options.description: Allow bilinear scaling Ativado scanout.

options.label: DITHERING FILTER
options.description: Recover significant color depth.

options.label: GAMMA DITHER
options.description: Allow gamma dither.

options.label: DIVOT FILTER
options.description: Cleans up stray black pixels.

options.label: NATIVE TEXTURE LOD
options.description: Use native texture LOD computation when upscaling.

options.label: OVERSCAN
options.description: Crop pixels around edge of screen.

options.label: Filtragem de Texturas
options.description: Smooths out the blockyness of magnified textures Ativado 3D objects by using filtering.

options.label: Filtragem Trilinear
options.description: Control the texture tri-filtering of the Emulação.

options.label: Filtragem Anisotrópica
options.description: Enhance the quality of textures Ativado surface.

options.label: DITHERING FILTER
options.description: Disabling dithering can remove some noise and pixelate effects.

options.label: BLENDING ACCURACY
options.description: Control the accuracy level of GS blending unit. Higher values will emulate blending more accurately in the shader.

options.label: ANTI BLUR
options.description: Enables anti blur hack, less accurate but makes games less blurry.

options.label: SUPERSAMPLING
options.description: SSAA offers better quality at the cost of performance.

options.label: HIGH RES SCANOUT
options.description: Allows upscaling, requires at least SSAA 4X.

options.label: Vídeo CORE RENDERER
options.description: Change the renderer used by the core.

options.label: OVERSCAN
options.description: Remove n pixels borders at the top and bottom of the screen.

options.description: Apply a Vídeo filter to mimic various signals.

options.label: PIXEL BLENDING
options.description: Required for certain games that use hi-res mode to produce transparency effects.

options.description: Zooms in to hide black borders. Borders are different per game.

options.label: 3DS MODEL
options.description: Force the region of the system.

options.label: MODEL TO EMULATE
options.description: Select the machine to emulate.

options.label: FRAME LIMIT
options.description: Force frame limiter.

options.label: MODEL TYPE
options.description: Define model, Padrão to BK-0010.

options.label: Vídeo FORMAT
options.description: Force the game region frequency to avoid emulated speed issues, leave 'Automático' unless you notice speed issues.

options.label: ENABLE FAST CPU CALCULATION
options.description: Required to run some old rom Hacks / Velocidade, leave Desativado for commercial games.

options.label: OVERCLOCKING
options.description: Overclock CPU, SA-1 chip and Super-FX chip, can reduce slowdowns but might generate issues with some games.

options.label: RUN-AHEAD FRAMES (CORE)
options.description: Use this setting to reduce input lag.

options.label: RUN-AHEAD FRAMES (CORE)
options.description: Use this setting to reduce input lag.

options.label: MODEL TYPE
options.description: Define model, Padrão to Spectrum 6128+ for GX4000.

options.label: RAM SIZE
options.description: CPC physical RAM size in kB.

options.label: REGION
options.description: Force the region of the system.

options.label: USE EXTERNAL BIOS
options.description: DesMumME has an internal BIOS, select this option to use the firmware from the RetroBat folder.

options.label: BOOT TO BIOS
options.description: Boot directly into the DS BIOS menu, needs external bios to be activated.

options.label: CPU MODE
options.description: Interpreter has better compatibility than JIT Dynamic Recompiler, JIT is faster.

options.label: SHADERS COMPILATION METHOD
options.description: Reduce stuttering a the cost of much longer delay to start a game and high GPU usage.

options.label: IGNORE VBI
options.description: Skip VBI when lag is detected, helps with Áudio stuttering when Emulação speed decreases.

options.label: Ativar Cheats / Trapaças
options.description: Enable the effects of the chosen Action Replay and Gecko codes for a game.

options.label: DUAL CORE CPU THREAD
options.description: Run games faster. A powerful option for gaining performance that has Não downsides some of the time. May cause various random issues caused by splitting the CPU and GPU threads onto different cores.

options.label: CPU CORE
options.description: JIT is fastest, Interpreter is more accurate.

options.label: MEMORY MANAGEMENT UNIT
options.description: Enable the Memory Management Unit. Required for some games.

options.label: CORE NOTIFICATIONS
options.description: Show core specific notifications.

options.label: LOAD DOSBOX.CONF
options.description: Try to use legacy dosbox.conf config file instead of core options.

options.label: CPU TYPE
options.description: Emulação method used. Automático for mixed features with max performance and compatibility.

options.label: CPU CYCLES
options.description: The raw performance to emulate.

options.label: CPU CORE
options.description: Use interpreter for best compatibility, dynarec for performance.

options.label: HIGH MEMORY

options.description: Switch the Player 1 controller type to Nenhum if the correct keyboard inputs aren't being read.

options.label: USE ANALOG AS ENTIRE KEYPAD
options.description: Can benefit some games.

options.label: CONTROL TYPE
options.description: Use JOYSTICK ONLY for joystick games and KEYBOARD ONLY for keyboard games.

options.label: 4-PLAYER MODE
options.description: Only compatible with ASIA/JAPAN MVS system.

options.label: ENABLE SECOND JOYSTICK
options.description: Second joystick might conflict with mouse.

options.label: USE MOUSE
options.description: Connect mouse to port 1.

options.label: ENABLE RUMBLE
options.description: Enables joypad rumble with compatible Gamepad.

options.label: USE MULTITAP
options.description: Manually select a 4 Player Adapter for some games

options.label: USE DPAD
options.description: Define the mapping of the D-PAD.

options.label: SWAP GAMEPADS
options.description: Some games accept input from port 2 instead of port 1.

options.label: NUMBER OF DEVICES
options.description: There is a bug in some games where having more than 1 active device crashes the emulator.

options.label: ANALOG DEADZONE(CORE)
options.description: Use this only if the analog stick is drifting.

options.label: ANALOG STICK SENSITIVITY
options.description: Change the sensitivity of the analog stick.

options.label: P1 CONTROLLER EXTENSION
options.description: Choose the extension attached to the controller.

options.label: RUMBLE LEVEL
options.description: Define the level of rumble and screen shaking, enable screenshake if the controller does not support rumble. 'Automático' enables both.

options.label: CONFIRMATION BUTTON
options.description: Select whether the cross input or the circle input is the confirmation button.

options.label: ENABLE MOUSE
options.description: Allows you to use mouse inputs even when device type isn't set to 'RetroKeyboard/Mouse'.

options.label: MOUSE CONTROL
options.description: Define which analog stick Controles the mouse pointer.

options.label: MOUSE SPEED
options.description: Adjust mouse pointer speed based Ativado the analog stick sensitivity.

options.label: KEYBOARD PASS-THROUGH
options.description: 'Ativado' passes all physical keyboard events to the core. 'Desativado' prevents RetroPad keys from generating keyboard events.

options.label: JOYPORT ORDER
options.description: Plug RetroPads in different ports, useful for 4-player adapters.

options.label: MOUSE CONTROL
options.description: Change D-Pad Controles between joystick and mouse.

options.label: CONTROLLER TYPE
options.description: When using software that requires full keyboard input, it's recommended to use game focus mode as well.

options.label: CONTROLLER TYPE
options.description: Define Gamepad type, applies to both players.

options.label: POINTER CONTROL
options.description: Select Mouse or Joypad to Controles in-game virtual pointer.

options.label: SELECT BUTTON MAPPING
options.description: Some games need a specific keyboard key to perform some actions, define the key to map to the SELECT button of player 1 controller.

options.label: INVERT VERTICAL AXIS
options.description: Invert the gamepad right analog stick's vertical axis.

options.label: ANALOG DEADZONE(CORE)
options.description: Sets the deadzone of the Gamepad analog sticks when the input device type is set to 'Gamepad Classic' or 'Gamepad Modern'.

options.label: ENABLE RUMBLE
options.description: Enables joypad rumble.

options.label: INVERT VERTICAL AXIS
options.description: Invert the gamepad right analog stick's vertical axis.

options.label: ANALOG DEADZONE(CORE)
options.description: Sets the deadzone of the Gamepad analog sticks when the input device type is set to 'Gamepad Classic' or 'Gamepad Modern'.

options.label: MOUSE SENSITIVITY
options.description: Change the sensitivity of the mouse.

options.label: ENABLE RUMBLE
options.description: Enables joypad rumble.
